text: Most messages are sent blind.
The same notification, to everyone, at the same time,
caption: The same notification, to everyone, at the same time,

text: hoping it lands.
Nexus works differently.
You write a handful of messages.
Think of each one as a seed.
Nexus decides who gets which seed.
It sends, it watches what grows,
and steers toward what's actually working.
Here's the idea.
Picture your audience as soil.
Some respond to encouragement.
Some to a gentle reminder.
Some to a question that makes them think.
No single message works for everyone.
So Nexus learns which seed thrives in which soil,
and plants more of what bears fruit.
Every hour, across push, email, and in app.
caption: Every hour — across push, email, in-app.

text: The longer it runs, the smarter it gets.
No more one size fits all.
caption: No more one-size-fits-all.

text: No more guessing.
Just the right message, for the right person,
every single time.
In production, that's a thirty four percent lift
caption: In production, that's a 34% lift

text: over sending to everyone.
Nexus. Stop sowing blind.
